properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The things that I love and hold dear to my heart Are just borrowed they're not mine at all Jesus only let me use them to brighten my light So remind me, remind me dear Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Roll back the curtain of memory now and then Show me where you brought me from And where I could have been Just remember I'm human, and human forget So remind me, remind me dear Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Nothing good have I done to deserve God's own son I'm not worthy of the scars in his hands Yet He chose the road to Calvary to die in my stead Why He loved me I can't understand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just remember I'm human, and human forget So remind me, remind me dear Lord
